args:
set -e

# Build a merged sysroot from glibc + linux-headers
mkdir -p /tmp/sysroot/include /tmp/sysroot/lib /tmp/sysroot/lib64
cp -a /deps/glibc/include/. /tmp/sysroot/include/
cp -a /deps/linux-headers/include/. /tmp/sysroot/include/
cp -a /deps/glibc/lib/. /tmp/sysroot/lib/
if [ -f /tmp/sysroot/lib/ld-linux-x86-64.so.2 ]; then
  ln -sf ../lib/ld-linux-x86-64.so.2 /tmp/sysroot/lib64/ld-linux-x86-64.so.2
fi

# Extract source
tar xf /deps/source/source -C /tmp
cd /tmp/make-4.4.1

# Configure make as cross-compile
CC="/deps/gcc-stage1/bin/x86_64-linux-gnu-gcc --sysroot=/tmp/sysroot -B/deps/seed/bin/" \
CFLAGS="-O2" \
LDFLAGS="-L/deps/gcc-stage1/lib -L/deps/gcc-stage1/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/13.2.0 -Wl,-rpath,/aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa/dummy" \
./configure \
  --prefix=/ \
  --build=x86_64-linux-musl \
  --host=x86_64-linux-gnu \
  --disable-nls \
  --disable-dependency-tracking

make -j$(nproc)
make install DESTDIR=$OUT

# Strip the binary
/deps/seed/bin/strip $OUT/bin/make 2>/dev/null || true

# Clean up - keep only bin/
rm -rf $OUT/share $OUT/include $OUT/lib $OUT/etc 2>/dev/null || true
